title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: What kind of films do you enjoy watching most?
How often do you go to concerts or live events?
Do you think watching films online has changed cinema culture?
What TV series are you currently watching? What do you enjoy about it?
Do you prefer going to the cinema alone or with others?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think film and TV series have a real influence on society's values?
Is it important to support local cinemas and theatres rather than streaming at home?
Do you prefer films that make you think, or films that entertain you?
